name: Baked Kibbee
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 4 tablespoons olive oil into the bottom of a 9x13 inch pan.
2. Divide the raw kibbee in half and press one layer into the pan.
3. Cover with meat filling and press the other half of kibbee on top.
4. Spread remaining olive oil on top.
5. Bake until deeply brown at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Meat filling:
- Coarsely grind 1 lb beef or lamb (I prefer lamb) for filling.
- Brown pine nuts in butter, then add onions until translucent.
- Brown meat with a pinch of cinnamon.
- Combine the meat mixture with pine nuts and onions.
6. Serve with plain yogurt.
Note: Just before baking the kibbee, score the top layer about 1/2 inch deep into 2-inch squares.
